comment: LLM generates code deltas to improve the trainable CaptionDecoder head.
prompt: Task: Generate a <delta> XML tag containing a unified diff to improve the [TRAINABLE] sections in the model code below.
Performance: {accuracy} (BLEU) at epoch {epoch}. Task: {task} on {dataset} using {metric}.

Rules: 1. Only modify [TRAINABLE] sections. 2. Keep [FROZEN] sections strictly identical. 3. Use real line numbers from <nn>. 4. Focus on improving projection or decoder logic. 5. IMPORTANT: train_setup() must strictly use prm.get('batch', 32) and prm.get('lr', 1e-4) to pass AST validation. Even if 'batch' is unused in the function, you MUST include `self.batch_size = prm.get('batch', 32)` or it will crash. 6. IMPORTANT: The forward method must return ONLY loss when captions are provided, and generate text when captions=None. 7. Maintain FrozenBlip2Encoder completely intact.
